title: 3D Character Art Lead
description:
About the Company
teamLFG (Sony Interactive Entertainment) is building an innovative new PlayStation IP with a passionate cross-discipline team focused on memorable characters and gameplay clarity.


About the Role
teamLFG is hiring a remote 3D Character Art Lead to guide character art from pre-production through production, mentor artists, and shape stylized characters that support fair, readable gameplay.


Responsibilities


  • Lead 3D character art and coordinate with narrative, design, and partner studios
  • Mentor artists through all production phases and foster strong creative feedback culture
  • Build scalable workflows, style guides, and quality standards for character assets
  • Partner with the art director on visual goals and character customization systems


Requirements


  • Deep understanding of character art for competitive action or fighting games
  • Early AAA game development leadership experience
  • Expert Maya/Blender/Max, Substance, and Unreal Engine skills
  • Stylized art expertise and experience scaling content with outsourcing partners


Compensation
$153,000 - $230,000 USD per year (varies by location; bonus and benefits eligible).


Location
Remote.

title: Digital Fashion Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Tailor Catalogue is a fashion-focused brand seeking creative talent for digital fashion illustration work.


About the Role
Tailor Catalogue is hiring a creative Digital Fashion Illustrator for a fully remote role creating fashion illustration work. Interested applicants should share a portfolio and brief introduction.


Responsibilities


  • Create digital fashion illustrations aligned with brand and campaign needs
  • Develop polished illustration assets for marketing and catalogue use
  • Collaborate remotely with the Tailor Catalogue team on creative direction
  • Deliver work on schedule with attention to detail and fashion aesthetics


Requirements


  • Strong portfolio demonstrating digital fashion illustration skills
  • Proficiency with digital illustration tools and workflows
  • Creative, detail-oriented approach and reliable remote communication
  • Ability to respond promptly to creative briefs and feedback


Compensation
₦150,000 per month.


Location
Remote.

title: Freelance Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Holistic Ecosystem is a creative team building anime-style art for stream-related graphics and inspiring visual projects.


About the Role
Holistic Ecosystem is hiring a freelance, project-based Illustrator to create anime-style and chibi artwork for stream-related graphics and collaborative creative projects.


Responsibilities


  • Create anime-style and chibi illustrations for stream-related graphics
  • Deliver project-based illustration work from brief through final assets
  • Collaborate with the creative team on fun, inspiring visual projects
  • Meet project deadlines and incorporate feedback efficiently


Requirements


  • Strong portfolio in anime-style illustration (chibi, vtuber, or background design a plus)
  • Experience with sketching, coloring, and detailing workflows
  • Ability to dedicate 2-8 hours per day depending on project scope
  • Portfolio link required (Google Drive, Pixiv, Instagram, ArtStation, or similar)


Compensation
Project-based freelance compensation determined per project based on complexity.


Location
Remote.
skills: Anime illustration,Chibi art,Character design,Stream graphics,Digital illustration

title: Illustrator Intern
description:
About the Company
Readeezy is a non-profit, fully digital library for adolescent, teen, and young adult struggling readers, publishing illustrated, interactive stories at accessible reading levels.


About the Role
Readeezy is hiring an Illustrator Intern to develop rich illustrations and simple animations for a 3,500-4,000 word story (40-50 pages), from character design and drafts through cover art, working closely with staff and authors.


Responsibilities


  • Illustrate an entire book: 40-50 illustrations and 5-6 simple animations
  • Develop character profiles, sketches, drafts, and cover art
  • Collaborate with the author and Readeezy editorial staff
  • Attend weekly Zoom check-in meetings and follow the production schedule


Requirements


  • Major in Illustration or related visual arts field and/or portfolio of digital character and background work
  • Proficient in digital drawing software and graphics tablet
  • Willing to illustrate mature-looking teen and collegiate-level characters and lively backgrounds
  • Strong communication, organization, and time management; up to 20 hours/week availability
  • Letter of recommendation required with application


Compensation
Unpaid internship with published portfolio credit and website feature.


Location
Remote.

title: Graphic Illustrator
description:
About the Company
Exela Publishing House LLP creates educational books and workbooks for kindergarten, primary, and middle school students.


About the Role
Exela Publishing House is hiring a remote Graphic Illustrator / Book Designer to design and illustrate engaging educational books, from page layouts and characters to print-ready files.


Responsibilities


  • Create engaging illustrations for educational books and workbooks
  • Design visually appealing, age-appropriate page layouts
  • Develop characters, visual assets, infographics, and activity-based illustrations
  • Prepare print-ready files and maintain organized source files


Requirements


  • Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, InDesign, Photoshop, or equivalent
  • Strong illustration and visual storytelling skills
  • Experience in book design, educational publishing, or children's publishing preferred
  • Good understanding of typography, page composition, and print production
  • Minimum 1 year of graphic design experience


Compensation
Competitive salary (work from home).


Location
Remote.
skills: Adobe Illustrator,Adobe InDesign,Adobe Photoshop,Book illustration,Print production

title: Senior Meta Ads Designer
description:
About the Company
ATTN Labs is a creative agency that helps brands cut through the noise with scroll-stopping content, sharp visual identities, and performance-driven creative across social and paid channels.


About the Role
ATTN Labs is hiring a Senior Graphic Designer who lives and breathes social-first design to own visual output for client campaigns across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTube.


Responsibilities


  • Concept and design high-performing paid ad graphics across multiple clients
  • Design across feed posts, stories, carousels, and display ad formats
  • Collaborate with strategists, editors, and account managers on briefs and deadlines
  • Adapt and resize assets quickly without sacrificing quality


Requirements


  • 5+ years in graphic design with a strong social and digital ad portfolio
  • Expert Adobe Creative Suite and Figma skills
  • Strong understanding of platform specs and performance creative
  • Self-starter mentality and strong English communication


Location
Remote.

title: Senior Motion Designer
description:
About the Company
Bone Studio is a design, product, and motion studio working with fast-moving teams across fintech, AI, and Web3 to turn complex ideas into clear, beautiful experiences.


About the Role
Bone Studio is hiring a senior motion designer to create launch content, product marketing assets, and brand animations for ambitious Web2 and Web3 clients.


Responsibilities


  • Create high-quality motion across brand, product, and marketing projects
  • Develop launch content, social assets, and visual storytelling pieces
  • Collaborate with designers, founders, and marketing teams
  • Bring static designs to life through thoughtful animation and strong craft


Requirements


  • Strong motion design portfolio with exceptional craft
  • Advanced After Effects proficiency
  • Excellent animation, timing, and storytelling skills
  • Experience with technology, fintech, SaaS, or Web3 brands is a plus


Location
Remote.

title: Associate Creative Director
description:
About the Company
Weedmaps is a global cannabis marketplace and media brand helping consumers and businesses navigate legal cannabis with transparency and community.


About the Role
Weedmaps is hiring a remote Associate Creative Director, Design to define and evolve the visual future of the brand across campaigns, social, editorial, lifecycle marketing, and product storytelling.


Responsibilities


  • Lead visual creative development across brand campaigns and social-first content
  • Establish and evolve visual identity, design systems, and modular creative frameworks
  • Partner with Editorial, Social, Growth, and Product Marketing on strategic objectives
  • Mentor designers, freelancers, and production partners while maintaining craft standards


Requirements


  • 8+ years in design, art direction, or creative leadership
  • Strong portfolio across campaigns, social content, and brand systems
  • Deep typography, layout, motion, and visual storytelling skills
  • Social-first and platform-native creative development experience


Compensation
$143,000 - $169,229 USD per year plus competitive bonus and benefits.


Location
Remote.

title: Senior Motion Designer
description:
About the Company
AlphaSense is a market-intelligence platform trusted by over 6,000 enterprise customers, delivering AI-driven insights from public and private content sets.


About the Role
AlphaSense is hiring a Senior Motion Designer on the Brand & Creative team to define the visual language of the brand in motion, from product UI reveals to high-concept brand films, while building scalable AI-augmented workflows.


Responsibilities


  • Create high-fidelity motion graphics for brand campaigns, product launches, and social
  • Design repeatable animation systems leveraging AI to reduce manual production work
  • Partner with Brand Leads on motion guidelines and global touchpoint consistency
  • Collaborate with Product Designers to translate Figma UI into marketing animations


Requirements


  • 8+ years in motion graphics with a strong portfolio
  • Expert After Effects; familiarity with C4D/Blender and Figma
  • Deep SaaS and complex UI animation experience
  • Active experimentation with generative AI tools in a creative workflow


Compensation
$116,000 - $160,000 USD per year.


Location
Remote.

title: UI Designer
description:
About the Company
NotifyAnyWhere LLC builds digital products and online properties requiring clean, responsive web design.


About the Role
NotifyAnyWhere is hiring a remote UI Designer with excellent creative skills to design clean, valid, responsive websites, wireframes, interactive prototypes, and mockups.


Responsibilities


  • Design responsive websites with wireframes, prototypes, and UI specifications
  • Define interaction models, user task flows, and cross-platform UI standards
  • Work in agile teams with remote collaborators
  • Manage design quality across online properties


Requirements


  • Minimum 4 years designing websites with a strong creative portfolio
  • Expert cross-browser and cross-platform design knowledge
  • Experience with responsive design and remote team collaboration


Location
Remote.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Company
HeartStamp is an AI-assisted greeting-card and invitation platform that gives users creative designer superpowers through its assistant Stampy.


About the Role
HeartStamp is hiring a part-time contract graphic designer (15-20 hrs/week) to produce scroll-stopping social graphics, Pinterest assets, web panels, and optional CapCut video edits with a bold, modern, internet-native look.


Responsibilities


  • Create static social posts and carousels for Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest, and X
  • Design Pinterest-optimized graphics and web marketing panels
  • Iterate quickly on what performs while maintaining a consistent brand look
  • Use Canva, Adobe, and AI image tools as part of the creative workflow


Requirements


  • Strong portfolio required (website, Dribbble, or Behance)
  • Fluency in Canva and Adobe (Photoshop, Premiere); CapCut is a major plus
  • Comfort with AI image-generation tools and American cultural fluency
  • Minimum C1 English and immediate availability


Compensation
$1,000 to $2,000 USD per month depending on scope and location (retainer based on deliverables).


Location
Remote.

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Company
LumiMeds is a fast-growing U.S. telehealth startup focused on weight management and long-term metabolic health, operating as a remote-first, globally distributed team.


About the Role
LumiMeds is hiring a video editor to cut short-form educational content, UGC, and paid social ads in a regulated healthcare category, working closely with creators and compliance reviewers.


Responsibilities


  • Edit 12-16 educational short-form videos per month plus 8-15 paid ad variations
  • Cut UGC from customers and paid creators into polished, native-feeling content
  • Apply brand standards, captions, and compliance reviewer feedback
  • Use AI editing tools strategically without compromising accuracy or compliance


Requirements


  • 2+ years editing short-form vertical video with paid social ad experience
  • Strong Premiere Pro, DaVinci, Final Cut, or CapCut Pro skills
  • AI captioning and transcript-based editing tool fluency
  • Portfolio with organic, UGC, and paid ad examples required


Location
Remote.
skills: Premiere Pro,CapCut,Short-form video,Paid ads,UGC editing,AI editing tools

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Company
Catch Creation is a global eCommerce company that creates, grows, and manages online brands through a fully remote, data-driven creative team.


About the Role
Catch Creation is hiring a remote Video Editor to produce product videos, influencer content, and social media ads that drive engagement and sales.


Responsibilities


  • Edit product videos, influencer content, ad creatives, and brand content for social platforms
  • Enhance raw footage with effects, transitions, sound, and graphics
  • Adapt content for different platforms and ad formats
  • Collaborate with influencers, designers, and marketers on campaign goals


Requirements


  • Proven video editing experience in e-commerce or digital marketing
  • Skilled in Premiere Pro, After Effects, or Final Cut Pro
  • Strong pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail
  • Portfolio or sample videos required


Location
Remote.
skills: Premiere Pro,After Effects,Final Cut Pro,E-commerce video,UGC editing

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Company
TubeScience is a performance-driven video content company partnering with innovative brands to create, test, and scale ads that drive measurable growth.


About the Role
TubeScience is hiring a remote Video Editor & Motion Graphics Designer (Philippines/APAC) to edit high-performing short-form ads for TikTok, Meta, and YouTube Shorts within U.S.-based pods.


Responsibilities


  • Edit high-performing short-form ads with strong hooks, story arcs, and CTAs
  • Collaborate with strategists and creative leads to test and iterate quickly
  • Own edits end-to-end while managing multiple fast-turn projects
  • Apply motion graphics and kinetic typography in After Effects


Requirements


  • 3+ years editing social video content (ads strongly preferred)
  • Expert Premiere Pro and intermediate+ After Effects skills
  • Personal licensed Adobe Creative Cloud access required
  • Available 3PM-12AM PST collaboration window


Location
Remote.

title: Freelance video editor
description:
About the Company
Filmless provides the fastest, easiest, and most affordable way for companies from startups to Fortune 500s to get professional videos.


About the Role
Filmless is hiring freelance video editors to create custom client videos from any city or country on a work-from-home contract basis.


Responsibilities


  • Edit compelling visual stories for diverse client briefs
  • Create and customize After Effects graphics and pro motion assets
  • Select music, SFX, and sound design elements
  • Collaborate with clients and internal team members under deadlines


Requirements


  • Portfolio/reel demonstrating editing and motion skills
  • Proficiency with Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Media Encoder
  • Experience with green screen and template-based AE workflows
  • Ability to manage multiple projects under pressure


Location
Remote.
skills: Premiere Pro,After Effects,Motion graphics,Sound design,Green screen

title: Freelance Senior Video Editor
description:
About the Company
Klick Health is a life-sciences marketing ecosystem with offices globally, consistently recognized as a Great Place to Work and Best Managed Company.


About the Role
Klick is hiring a senior freelance video editor to turn loose ideas into cinematic pitch films, sizzles, and concept films for pharma and healthcare brands under tight timelines.


Responsibilities


  • Edit high-impact pitch films, manifestos, and TV-style executions from rough scripts or decks
  • Source and combine stock, archival footage, music, VO, and provided assets
  • Use AI tools to generate or extend imagery and explore sound options
  • Collaborate with creative, strategy, and production teams on fast-turn pitches


Requirements


  • Senior editing experience in advertising, branded content, or healthcare marketing
  • Expert Premiere Pro plus After Effects skills
  • Portfolio showing emotional storytelling, pacing, and music sensibility
  • Comfort using AI tools like Runway, ElevenLabs, or similar in pitch workflows


Location
Remote.
skills: Premiere Pro,After Effects,Pitch editing,Stock footage,AI video tools

title: Video Editor
description:
About the Company
Whitecollars supports a fast-growing health and wellness e-commerce portfolio targeting Lebanese and GCC markets with performance-driven Arabic video content.


About the Role
Whitecollars is hiring a freelance video editor specializing in direct-response DTC ads, VSLs, and Meta creatives for Arabic-speaking markets - not cinematic or documentary work.


Responsibilities


  • Edit high-converting VSLs (3-6+ minutes) and Meta ad creatives
  • Build scroll-stopping hooks and retention-focused direct-response edits
  • Produce AI-powered UGC and AI-generated B-roll where appropriate
  • Iterate quickly on performance feedback and winning creative variants


Requirements


  • Real experience editing DTC e-commerce and paid social ads
  • Understanding of hook rate, retention, CTR, and conversion-focused editing
  • Health, wellness, beauty, or dropshipping ad experience preferred
  • Arabic language fluency preferred (Lebanese or Egyptian Arabic)


Location
Remote.
skills: DTC video editing,VSL editing,Meta ads,Performance creative,AI UGC
